data.summary_suggestion: Copy content between storage providers
data.description_suggestion: Copies content from third-party storage providers or Intralinks storage accounts into Intralinks workspaces. Supports multiple source formats: fully qualified URIs (including Dropbox public links), Intralinks storage DataObject references, and asset-based references. Destinations can be specified as URIs or asset references (workspaces/folders). The 'source' parameter accepts an array of source objects, each containing either a 'url' or 'asset' property. The 'destination' parameter specifies a single target location. Returns a 201 status on successful copy operation. Supports both v1 and v2 API endpoint formats.
data.reasoning: Original lacks summary and buries critical information in markdown-formatted examples.
